name: Sky Striker Maneuver - Jamming Waves!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>閃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>刀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>式</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ジャミングウェーブ
desc: If you control no monsters in your Main Monster Zone: Target 1 Set Spell/Trap on the field; destroy it, then, if you have 3 or more Spells in your GY, you can destroy 1 monster on the field.
eff: If you control no monsters in your Main Monster Zone: Target 1 Set Spell/Trap on the field; destroy it, then, if you have 3 or more Spells in your GY, you can destroy 1 monster on the field.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-down Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-down Trap Cards
misc: Requires control of no monsters in the Main Monster Zone
